title: Site Attestation
description: SD-JWT VC schema for the WeBuild Site Attestation (vct: eu.we-build:site:1). Provides a standardized, verifiable digital representation of a specific physical location (site) operated by an economic operator.

vct.description: Verifiable Credential Type identifier. SHALL be the fixed string 'eu.we-build:site:1'.

iss.description: Issuer identifier (DID or URI) of the economic operator that issued this attestation.

iat.description: Issued-at time as a Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch). SHALL be in the past.

exp.description: Expiry time as a Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch). SHALL be greater than iat.

jti.description: Unique identifier for this credential instance (JWT ID).

attestation_legal_category.description: Legal category of this attestation as defined by eIDAS 2. SHALL be 'EAA'. NOT selectively disclosable.

parent_economic_operator_main_id.description: Primary unique identifier of the economic operator that operates this site. Preferred: EUID for EU-registered entities. SHALL be non-empty.

parent_economic_operator_id.description: Structured object containing economic operator identifiers. At least one sub-field SHALL be provided. All sub-fields are individually optional.

euid.description: European Unique Identifier per Directive (EU) 2017/1132. Preferred identifier for EU legal entities.

lei.description: Legal Entity Identifier per ISO 17442. 20-character alphanumeric code.

gln.description: Global Location Number for legal entities — GS1 identifier. 13-digit numeric string.

duns.description: Data Universal Numbering System — Dun & Bradstreet company identifier. 9-digit numeric string.

eori.description: Economic Operators Registration and Identification number — EU customs identifier.

bpnl.description: Business Partner Number Legal entity — Catena-X identifier per International Code Designator (ICD): 0243.

siren.description: Système d'Identification du Répertoire des ENtreprises — French company identifier. 9-digit numeric string.

site_name.description: The name of the site. SHALL be non-empty.

site_main_id.description: Globally unique identifier of the site generated by the EBW as a UUID. SHALL NOT change during the lifecycle of the site.

site_additional_ids.description: Array of additional site-level identifiers. MAY contain zero or more entries. SHALL use identifier type codes from Section 2.8.2 (BPNS, GLN_site, SIRET, DUNS_site).

site_main_address.description: Physical main address of the site. SHALL be present and SHALL contain street, nr, postal_code, and city.

site_additional_addresses.description: Array of additional addresses associated to the site (e.g., additional entrances or addresses of external/rented buildings). MAY contain zero or more entries.

status.description: Revocation status claim. MUST be present if the validity period is greater than 24 hours.

status_list_credential.description: URI of the Status List Credential document containing the status bitstring.

status_list_index.description: Zero-based index into the status list bitstring corresponding to this credential.

trust_anchor_url.description: URL where the trust anchor for verifying this attestation can be retrieved. Optional metadata.

schema_version.description: Version of the schema used for this attestation. Optional metadata.

cnf.description: Confirmation claim binding the credential to the holder's key material per RFC 7800.

jwk.description: JSON Web Key of the holder.

Address.title: Address
Address.description: Physical address object per Core Location Vocabulary.

nr.description: House or building number of the address.
